span.p: GPU pipeline — N_points instances x 6 vertices

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
vs_main
1. clip_center = transform x pos
2. pixel_offset = quad_corner x size
corrected for aspect ratio
3. uv = quad_corner x 2 range -1 to 1
passed to fragment stage

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
fs_main
1. dist = length of uv
2. discard if dist gt 1.0 — circle clip
3. smoothstep edge — antialiasing
4. ring band — dark outline
5. alpha x uniforms.alpha x highlight

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; text-align: center;

span.p:
Framebuffer
alpha-blended onto
egui UI layer

span.p:
point_buf
x y r g b highlight size
per point

span.p:
uniform_buf
transform · size · aspect · alpha
64 bytes

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; text-align: center;

span.p:
RenderPipeline
WGSL shader compiled
instanced draw configured

PointsCallbackResources
stored in egui-wgpu
CallbackResources map

span.p:
build_transform
pan · zoom · bounds
returns 4x4 matrix

span.p:
queue.write_buffer
to uniform_buf
transform · point_size
viewport_aspect · alpha

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
renderer.draw
set_pipeline
set_bind_group
set_vertex_buffer 0 point_buf
set_vertex_buffer 1 quad_buf
draw 0..6 0..N_points
